---
title: "π's CyberCave"
listing:
  contents: articles/
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
---

```{r count-chars}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
articles <- list.files("articles", pattern = "\\.qmd$", full.names = TRUE)
total_chars <- sum(sapply(articles, function(f) {
  lines <- readLines(f, warn = FALSE)
  sum(nchar(lines))
}))
cat("<div id='total-chars' style='display:none' data-chars='", total_chars, "'></div>", sep = "")
```

<div class="hero-section">
  <h1>探索技术，记录成长</h1>
  <p class="hero-subtitle">记录分享写码经验与教程--工作、娱乐和业余创作</p>
  <div class="hero-meta">
  <span id="hero-article-count"></span>
  <span id="hero-tag-count"></span>
  <span id="hero-char-count"></span>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  setTimeout(function() {
    // Count articles
    var n = document.querySelectorAll('.quarto-grid-item').length;
    document.getElementById('hero-article-count').textContent = n + ' 篇文章';

    // Count unique categories from filter sidebar
    var tagSet = new Set();
    document.querySelectorAll('.quarto-listing-category .category').forEach(function(el) {
      var cat = el.getAttribute('data-category');
      if (cat) tagSet.add(cat);
    });
    document.getElementById('hero-tag-count').textContent = tagSet.size + ' 个标签';

    // Show total character count
    var charsEl = document.getElementById('total-chars');
    if (charsEl) {
      var chars = parseInt(charsEl.getAttribute('data-chars'));
      document.getElementById('hero-char-count').textContent = chars.toLocaleString() + ' 字';
    }
  }, 200);
});
</script>
